title: How was Ramiel going to get into the Geofront
display_title: How was Ramiel going to get into the Geofront
wikitext:
[]: How was Ramiel going to get into the Geofront?             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Fri Sep 11, 2009 11:55 am I just thought about this.... Ramiel, at his widest, is hundreds of miles across. That drill was tiny in comparison to his width. Even if his drill pierced into the Geofront, there was no way he could have fit into a hole that size... This begs another question: why didn't Ramiel simply burn a hole down to NERV with his laser cannon?

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Fri Sep 11, 2009 12:02 pm I guess all Ramiel had to do was touch Lillith with his drill. So he just needed to keep on drilling after he got through the armored layers. If he tried to blast his way in he could destroy Lillith, which he thought was Adam. So Ramiel didn't wan't to destoy her on accident.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Fri Sep 11, 2009 1:23 pm What Sam said. Besides, it's not like Angels can't shapeshift or something. If Ramiel did have to bring his entire body down, I see no reason why it couldn't turn into a liquid or something.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Sep 11, 2009 2:41 pm He would've used magic! Sammaeloo wrote: I guess all Ramiel had to do was touch Lillith with his drill.

[]:             Quote Post by Iam(not)toji » Fri Sep 11, 2009 2:54 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: Sammaeloo wrote: I guess all Ramiel had to do was touch Lillith with his drill.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Sep 11, 2009 3:06 pm We have the hard data lying around, folks. http://www.evacommentary.org/appendix/angel-size-comparison.jpg http://www.evacommentary.org/images_production/geofront-dimensional.jpg

[]: Re: How was Ramiel going to get into the Geofront?             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Fri Sep 11, 2009 5:05 pm CyberXIII wrote: This begs another question:

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Fri Sep 11, 2009 6:50 pm I submit the caption of "Pfft, Longinus was bigger."

[]: Re: How was Ramiel going to get into the Geofront?             Quote Post by pmkava » Sun Sep 13, 2009 12:02 pm CyberXIII wrote: Ramiel, at his widest, is hundreds of miles across.

[]: Re: How was Ramiel going to get into the Geofront?             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Sep 13, 2009 12:41 pm Ramiel could potentially do what it did in Rebuild: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Sun Sep 13, 2009 1:36 pm I was exaggerating. Disregarding the scale argument, Rami is still really frickin' wide.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Sep 13, 2009 1:53 pm CyberXIII wrote: I was exaggerating. Disregarding the scale argument, Rami is still really frickin' wide.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sun Sep 13, 2009 7:06 pm I imagine Ramiel's drill was probably allowed it to simply get in contact with Lilith, which would presumably have been enough. As to why Ramiel didn't just burn its way though, there are two possible solutions. 1) It didn't have the energy neccessary for such a prolonger burst. 2) Narrative.

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Sun Sep 13, 2009 9:23 pm 2. Is much more likely and if you pardon my jargon here a quick and easy route to lillith would've ended the movie as it would've possibly made it to where the heroes couldnt stop him. One of the non-law-truths of mvies/books/comics/media there has to be time to stop the bad guy in many cases. Just like in horror movies the slut always dies, or the black guy dies first, etc. Actually, if you will excuse this discussion is better suited for the offtopic forum.
